function.name: _table_record_batch_update
function.description: Batch update specified data table records. Must update the corresponding table data according to the prompt, and must not update table data unrelated to the prompt. Args: tableId: Data table ID, must be filled in, data comes from the id field obtained by calling _query_all_table_list, do not fabricate it yourself; recordList: Record list, the key of the record is the data table field ID. Returns: The number of batch updated data tables

items.description: Record field key-value pairs, where the key is the field ID and the value is the new data. When the field type is Cascader, if it is a single selection, the stored structure is an array, such as ["Guangdong Province","Shenzhen City","Nanshan District"], if it is a multiple selection, it is a two-dimensional array.
